scripts.generate: bun run generate:shared-js && bun run generate:contract-artifact && bun run generate:vendor
scripts.setup: bun install --frozen-lockfile && bun run contracts && bun run build
scripts.build: bun run shared && bun run refresh:shared-dependency && tsc && bun run build:workers
scripts.build:prod: bun run shared && bun run refresh:shared-dependency && bun ./build/production.mts
scripts.build:tests: bun run shared && bun run refresh:shared-dependency && bun ./build/tests.mts
scripts.watch: cd .. && bun run ensure-shared-build && cd ui && bun run check:shared-dependency && tsc --watch
scripts.serve: cd .. && bun run ensure-shared-build && cd ui && bun run check:shared-dependency && bun x tsc --project tsconfig.json && bun ./dev-server.ts
